user_intent_summary: Identify flights departing from Istanbul that have associated anomalies or alarms.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for records where flights departed from Istanbul and had alarms. Groups by departure/arrival airports and month to detect anomalous volumes per route-month. Uses 'tot' as the anomaly metric (count of alarms).

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Filters for flights departing Istanbul with non-normal outcomes (alarms/incidents). Groups by route and month to detect anomalous alarm counts. Uses 'allarmati' (flagged travelers) as the anomaly metric.
